import asyncio

lock = asyncio.Lock()


async def transfer_funds(sender_id: int, recipient_id: int, amount: int):
    async with lock:
        sender = await fetch_account(sender_id)
        recipient = await fetch_account(recipient_id)

        if sender.balance < amount:
            raise ValueError("Insufficient funds")

        await deduct_balance(sender_id, amount)
        await log_transaction(sender_id, recipient_id, amount)
        await send_notification(sender_id, "Funds deducted")

        await add_balance(recipient_id, amount)
        await log_transaction(recipient_id, sender_id, amount)
        await send_notification(recipient_id, "Funds received")


async def update_inventory(product_id: int, quantity: int):
    async with lock:
        product = await fetch_product(product_id)
        if product.stock < quantity:
            raise ValueError("Insufficient stock")

        await reduce_stock(product_id, quantity)
        await notify_warehouse(product_id, quantity)
        await update_search_index(product_id)
        await publish_event("inventory.updated", product_id)
